metadata.description: Claude Code skills for personal CRM workflows with Evergreen — contact management, follow-ups, email integration, networking, and relationship nurturing

plugins.name: evergreen-complete
plugins.description: All 18 Evergreen CRM skills — contact management, follow-ups, email integration, networking, and reporting

plugins.name: evergreen-essentials
plugins.description: Core daily-driver skills — contact capture, follow-ups, meeting prep, and context recall

plugins.name: evergreen-email
plugins.description: Gmail integration skills — inbox scanning, auto-logging interactions, follow-ups, and re-engagement

plugins.name: evergreen-networking
plugins.description: Relationship nurturing skills — event follow-ups, introductions, network analysis, and life events

plugins.name: evergreen-reporting
plugins.description: Monitoring and maintenance skills — weekly reports, stale data audits, and news alerts
